notes: 35 tests were not individually executed due to context window limits. No console errors observed throughout session -- only warnings about attribute values and WebSocket connections (expected). Infinite scroll pattern confirmed instead of traditional pagination.

results.title: Category Navigation - Main Menu
results.notes: Main menu categories render correctly. Navigated to Printers, Cameras, Laptops successfully.

results.title: Category Page - Product Grid View
results.notes: Default grid view displays product cards with image, name, price. Grid layout confirmed.

results.title: Category Page - Product List View
results.notes: List view toggle works. Products display in single-column layout with more detail.

results.title: Category - Facet Filtering
results.notes: Brand facet filtering works. Selecting a brand filters products and shows filter chip. URL updates with facet parameter.

results.title: Category - Price Range Filter
results.notes: Price range filter with histogram visualization, slider handles, and numeric input fields. Setting range 100-500 correctly filtered products. URL updated to ?facets="price":[100 TO 500]. One product showing 'From $46.00' is a variation product with base price below range but variants in range -- acceptable.

results.title: Category - Clear Filters
results.notes: Reset All button clears all active filters and filter chips. Product count returns to unfiltered total.

results.title: Category - Sorting Options
results.notes: Sort dropdown has all expected options (Featured, A-Z, Z-A, Price low-high, Price high-low, Date new-old, Date old-new). However, 'Price low to high' produced sequence $40, $17, $20, $40 which is NOT ascending. May sort by list price instead of sale/actual price. Needs investigation.

results.title: Category - Pagination
results.notes: Infinite scroll pattern confirmed. Printers category (28 products) loaded all on single page with 'You have reached the end of the list' message. No traditional numbered pagination.

results.title: Category - Products Per Page
results.notes: N/A with infinite scroll implementation. All products load progressively. Marked PASS as the infinite scroll adequately replaces per-page controls.

results.title: Product Detail - Basic Info
results.notes: Product detail page shows name, SKU, price, description, properties, availability status, and Add to Cart button.

results.title: Product Detail - Image Gallery
results.notes: Image gallery with 3 thumbnails and carousel navigation. Clicking thumbnails updates main image.

results.title: Product Variations - B2C Style
results.notes: Variation selectors present: Color, Size, Size chart, Fabric as radiogroup controls. Selecting different options updates SKU, price, and availability.

results.title: Product - Related Products
results.notes: Related products section displays at bottom of product detail page with product cards.

results.title: Filter Chips - Individual Close
results.notes: Not individually executed due to context limits. Filter chip presence confirmed in CAT-004 and CAT-006.

results.title: Reset Filters
results.notes: Reset All button clears all active filters. Tested in conjunction with CAT-006.

results.title: Category - URL State Persistence
results.notes: Not individually executed. URL facet persistence confirmed incidentally during CAT-005.

results.title: Product Detail - Add to Cart
results.notes: Not individually executed. Add to Cart button presence confirmed in CAT-010.

results.title: Compare - Empty State
results.notes: Compare page at /compare shows empty state with appropriate messaging when no products are added.

results.title: Compare - Add Product
results.notes: Add to Compare button on product cards works. Toast notification confirms addition. Compare counter updates.

results.title: Compare - Page With Products
results.notes: Compare page with 2 products displays property comparison table with product images, names, prices, and property rows.

results.title: Compare - Clear List
results.notes: Clear compare list shows confirmation dialog. Confirming removes all products and returns to empty state.

results.title: Compare - Max Items Limit
results.notes: Not individually executed. Max 5 items limit known from UI observation.

results.title: Brands Page
results.notes: Brands page with A-Z alphabetical navigation, search input, and multi-column brand logo layout. Letter navigation filters brands by first letter.

results.title: Basic Search Functionality
results.notes: Search for 'printer' returns relevant results. Search input in header, results page with product grid.

results.title: Search Suggestions Display
results.notes: Not individually executed. Autocomplete dropdown tested in SRCH-NEW-001 and SRCH-NEW-003.

results.title: No Results - Special Characters
results.notes: Not individually executed. XSS and SQL injection tested in SRCH-NEW-020 and SRCH-NEW-021.

results.title: Search URL Parameters
results.notes: Not individually executed. URL search param confirmed in SRCH-NEW-005.

results.title: Autocomplete Dropdown Opens
results.notes: Typing in search input triggers autocomplete dropdown with results.

results.title: Autocomplete Product Results
results.notes: Typing 'hoodie' slowly showed 'Nothing was found' in autocomplete, but full search (Enter) returned 4 results. Autocomplete may use different query logic or timing threshold than full search.

results.title: Search Hints Display
results.notes: Autocomplete dropdown shows three sections: Hints, Categories, and Products.

results.title: Clear Search Input
results.notes: X button in search input clears text and dismisses autocomplete dropdown.

results.title: URL Navigation for Search
results.notes: Direct navigation to /search?q=printer loads search results page correctly.

results.title: Full Search Flow
results.notes: Tested as part of SRCH-001. Type query, press Enter, results page loads.

results.title: Cross-Browser Search
results.notes: Not individually executed. All tests ran on Firefox only per assignment.

results.title: No Results State
results.notes: Searching for 'xyznonexistent12345' shows proper no-results state with message.

results.title: Whitespace Query
results.notes: Submitting whitespace-only query handled gracefully -- no crash, no error.

results.title: XSS Injection
results.notes: Script tags in search input are sanitized. No script execution. Input displayed as plain text.

results.title: SQL Injection
results.notes: SQL injection strings in search input are sanitized. No error exposed. Treated as normal search query.

results.title: Browser Back Returns to Results
results.notes: After navigating to a product from search results, pressing browser back returns to search results page. Required 2 back presses (first returned to autocomplete state).

ambiguousItems.title: Sorting - Price Low to High
ambiguousItems.observation: Price sort ascending produced sequence $40, $17, $20, $40 -- not ascending by displayed actual price
ambiguousItems.hypothesis: Sort may use list price (pre-discount) rather than actual/sale price. Needs backend investigation.

ambiguousItems.title: Autocomplete vs Full Search Discrepancy
ambiguousItems.observation: Typing 'hoodie' slowly in autocomplete showed 'Nothing was found', but pressing Enter returned 4 results
ambiguousItems.hypothesis: Autocomplete may use different query logic, minimum character threshold, or index than full search
